column1: A Tornado Warning has been issued for our area. Stay tuned for further updates on your ABC Action News Station.
Tornados is the part I hate about this weather 😳
exactly
snow storms don’t seem so bad!😳
I guess not😂
same here.
The eye on radar looks east of the track, does it not?
Prayers for safety, Donna! 🙏
The eye has been riding the east coast of the track and actually turned a bit east. 30 miles east. Wondering if we will get rougher rain.
Which is a warning? We have the ingredients for tacos or tacos have been made? I always get confused.
thank you. Now I need to apologize to my son for him being right and me, well, not.
.. my mother always said 'watch for the warning' .. only way I can remember.
watch is looking for a tornado, warning is one has been detected
warning is imminent threat, take cover find your safe spot

watch = ingredients
Warning = made
Um, if the cable or power is out........
What about hightland county florida
How long will we see these winds and rain in Treasure Island
Keep us updated in citrus County and Dunnellon. Thank you
What is that?
yep yep
Stay safe everyone
What do you have for North Port area?
“Take shelter in your basement “ said no Floridian ever!
Watching your station. Hopefully no tornadoes touch down. Winds are wicked out there.
Bring it ! I need some excitement!
go sky diving, bungee jumping or really high zip lining and leave the rest of us out of this.
In-laws in largo said this is nothing. Maybe they want bigger.
Down Town Port Charlotte/ Punta Gorda.
Daughter in Tampa says this guy is the best weather person to follow.
Denis is the MAN! My weatherman for well over 20 years
absolutely
no doubt
he is. He has a straightforward delivery that is actually calming. He’s not about hype and when it’s not hurricane season he’s about making us laugh.
he is..
he is
